title: AI Chat
error_generic: Sorry, there was an error. Please try again.
welcome: I'm **Omnes** 🦉, your financial chef. I see everything in your business and tell it to you straight. I can help you with:
suggestion_price_increase: Which ingredient has gone up in price?
suggestion_low_stock: Which ingredients are low on stock?
suggestion_most_expensive: What is my most expensive ingredient?
suggestion_most_profitable: What is my most profitable dish?
suggestion_high_food_cost: Which dishes have high food cost?
suggestion_price_suggestion: What price should I set for this dish?
suggestion_compare_suppliers: Which supplier is cheapest for the same product?
suggestion_spending: How much do I spend per supplier?
suggestion_food_cost: What is the current food cost?
suggestion_portions: How many portions can I make today?
action_completed: Action completed. Data has been updated.
clear_confirm_hint: Click again to clear the chat
subtitle: Your financial chef
informe_addon_required: You need the Chat AI add-on active to generate reports.
informe_error: Could not generate the report. Try again in a moment.
informe_popup_blocked: Allow pop-ups to view the report
healthcheck_addon_required: You need the Chat AI add-on active for the Health Check.
healthcheck_error: Could not generate the Health Check. Try again in a moment.
